calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-28-2015 Vacated

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Apr-14-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Pending Action of a Person with a Disability.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols; Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Mitch L. Lyon, #6840.

Brendan Way, Esq. appeared with petitioner Kathryn Steinbach, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for claimant Peter A. DeLira, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner and Claimant were placed under oath, but did not testify.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $440,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $146,666.67.
Costs - $3,941.74.
Medical Liens - $86,919.62.

The net balance of $202,471.97 shall be deposited in the previously established special needs trust for Claimant entitled THE PETER A. DELIRA SPECIAL NEEDS TRUST.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Pending Action of a Person with a Disabililty was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to December 9, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218 for a Progress Report re: Receipt & Acknowledgment of Deposit of Money Into a Blocked Account.
